commit.message:
fix: remove deleted_at column references from beads queries

The beads schema has no deleted_at column — it uses status to track
lifecycle. All queries filtering on deleted_at IS NULL were failing
for every beads database (witness, bucket, hq, tapestry, etc).

functional modules that call real API endpoints:

- Appointments: 20 appointments, calendar view, booking modal

- Reviews: 15 reviews, star ratings, inline reply, sentiment

All API routes return structured demo data (no DB required).
Orchestrator route converted to demo mode (was breaking build).
StatCard component extended with subtitle prop.

- Strip punctuation from transcripts before matching

fix: safe type casts in chunked upload for Flutter web release build

dart2js returns Map<String, Object> from JSON, not Map<String, dynamic>.
Replace all explicit 'as Map<String, dynamic>' and 'as String' casts
with 'as Map' + .toString() to avoid TypeError in minified release builds.

commit.message:
fix: replace ::jsonb casts with CAST() in SQLAlchemy text() queries

psycopg2 interprets ':' as a parameter prefix, so ':param::jsonb' is a
syntax error. Use CAST(:param AS jsonb) instead — same fix as the ::vector
issue resolved earlier.

commit.message:
Add live Google Maps tracking for all roles

Implemented real-time location tracking system for delivery:

## 1. Location Tracking Service ✅
File: `lib/core/services/location_tracking_service.dart`
- Real-time GPS tracking for delivery partners
- Broadcasts location updates every 10 meters
- Stream-based architecture for multiple listeners
- Distance calculation between points
- Permission handling

Features:
- `startTracking()` - Start GPS tracking (delivery partners)
- `stopTracking()` - Stop GPS tracking
- `getCurrentLocation()` - Get location once
- `locationStream` - Real-time position updates
- `calculateDistance()` - Distance between coordinates

## 2. Live Tracking Map Widget ✅
File: `lib/shared/widgets/live_tracking_map.dart`
- Google Maps integration with real-time updates
- Shows delivery partner moving in real-time
- Shows customer location marker
- Dashed polyline route between partner & customer
- Distance calculation display
- Live indicator badge
- Auto-camera follow

Features:
- Delivery partner marker (blue) with live updates
- Customer location marker (red)
- Distance display (meters/km)
- "Live" status indicator
- Smooth camera animations
- Loading state while locating

## 3. Google Maps Configuration ✅
- Added Google Maps API key meta-data to AndroidManifest
- Location permissions already configured
- Ready for API key integration

## How to Use:

### For Delivery Partners:
```dart
// Start tracking when accepting delivery
await LocationTrackingService().startTracking();

// Stop when delivery complete
await LocationTrackingService().stopTracking();
```

### For Customers (Track Delivery):
```dart
LiveTrackingMap(
  customerLat: order.deliveryLatitude,
  customerLng: order.deliveryLongitude,
  deliveryPartnerName: order.deliveryPartnerName ?? 'Delivery Partner',
)
```

### For Admin (Monitor All Deliveries):
```dart
LiveTrackingMap(
  showCustomerMarker: false, // Show all active deliveries
)
```

## Integration Points:
1. Customer Order Details - Add "Track Delivery" button
2. Delivery Partner - Auto-start tracking on active delivery
3. Admin Dashboard - View all active deliveries on map

## Setup Required:
⚠️ **IMPORTANT**: Replace `YOUR_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY_HERE` in AndroidManifest.xml
with actual Google Maps API key from Google Cloud Console

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: v0.3.0 — auto-download Ollama + auto-pull models on first launch

Users no longer need to install Ollama separately.
On first launch, VaultMind:
1. Checks if Ollama is already running (system install) → uses it
2. Searches common install paths for the ollama binary
3. If not found, downloads the CLI binary (~100MB) to app data dir
4. Starts `ollama serve` as a managed child process
5. Pulls nomic-embed-text and mistral with real-time progress bar
6. Kills the managed Ollama server on app quit

Progress shown in loading splash: download MB counter, model pull progress,
all mapped to a smooth 0-100% bar.

If user already has Ollama installed, everything skips straight to model check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: Remove includePdf from sales fetch and revert purchase chunking

- Remove includePdf=true from GetSalesInvoice request (was causing 500)
- Revert GetPurchaseInvoice back to single full-range request
  Chunking was making it worse: DevPos 500s on empty date ranges,
  so most weekly chunks (no invoices that week) all failed → total=0.
  Full-range request works because it has actual data to return.

commit.message:

fix: Initialize Resend client per-request instead of at module load

Env vars read at module level get cached for the lifetime of the
serverless function instance. If RESEND_API_KEY isn't available at
cold start, emails silently go through the simulation path. Moving
reads into sendEmail() ensures fresh evaluation on every request.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite instructor as mentor — agent shows work, student watches and learns

The agent is no longer a quiz master. It walks alongside the student:
1. Narrates what it is about to do and why
2. Shows the exact command
3. Student says "go" (or types their own command)
4. Agent runs it, shows output
5. Explains what the results mean
6. Opens conversation — student can ask questions anytime
7. Claude responds naturally as a mentor, not with quiz deflections

Room YAML format changed:
- Steps now have: narration, command, explanation, teach_after, conversation
- No more questions/hints/accept keywords — the teaching is in the walkthrough
- Commands use {target} placeholder, replaced at runtime
- Manual steps (no command) wait for student to complete and type "done"

Brain system prompt rewritten for mentor persona:
- "You are the senior operator, student is shadowing you"
- Direct answers, no "what do you think?" deflections
- Evaluates alternative approaches the student suggests

fix: use integer campaign_id for MemoryStore (not session UUID)

MemoryStore migrated to PostgreSQL keyed by integer campaign_id, but
three call sites still passed session_id (a UUID string), causing a
ValueError on every Session Zero handoff and orchestrator init.

- orchestrator.py: use self.campaign_id (already int) instead of self.session_id
- session_zero.py process_session_zero_state: guard on campaign_id, skip if missing
- session_zero.py index_session_zero_to_memory: accept campaign_id param, skip if None
- route handoff: move memory indexing to after campaign is resolved; pass resolved_campaign_id

Add form definition framework and custom form element blocks

  optional panel-overridable properties (label, options, likert labels)

- BaseFormDefinition: abstract base class; resolves specs against panel
  overrides and produces ready-to-render field arrays

  radio-group, likert, select — with blueprints and snippets
- form/definition-fields snippet renders a ResolvedFormField[]
- formFields section gains customFormElements blocks field
- form_submission blueprint gains form_type field

  (checkboxes) are joined as comma-separated strings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix nomination cache: remove underscore prefix so Streamlit hashes nom_ids

The _nom_ids parameter was prefixed with underscore, which tells Streamlit
to EXCLUDE it from the cache key hash. This meant changing NOM_PUBOBJ_IDS
(e.g. adding PUBOBJ1157 for LDZ) did not invalidate the cache, causing
stale results until TTL expired. Renamed to nom_ids and passed through
to _fetch_nominations_csv for correct cache invalidation.

- Cards: White (#FFFFFF) with subtle shadows

4. **AddEditMenuItemScreen** - Light theme applied:

## Visual Changes:
